news.t: TCW to Change Listing Exchange of ETFs to NYSE
TCW Completes Conversion of Two Mutual Funds to ETFs

holdings.infoBox: AIFD is an equity ETF with a total of 34 individual holdings. The top holdings are Micron Technology stock at 6.80%, Marvell Technology at 6.47%, NVIDIA at 6.39%, Lumentum Holdings at 6.30%, and DigitalOcean Holdings at 5.95%.

overview.description: The TCW Artificial Intelligence ETF (AIFD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund is an actively managed fund of global equity securities of companies focusing on and benefiting from artificial intelligence. It primarily selects growth companies and seeks long-term growth of capital. AIFD was launched on May 6, 2024 and is issued by TCW.

data.title: TCW's Jennifer Grancio: Huge acceleration happening in ETFs
data.text: Jennifer Grancio, TCW global head of ETFs, joins 'Squawk on the Street' to discuss ETF activity, market competition, and much more.
